summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The SLW Short Duration Income ETF (SLWS) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad credit fixed income. The fund is an actively managed fund that broadly invests in short-term fixed-income securities with varying credit quality. The fund seeks to preserve capital and provide liquidity while generating an optimal level of risk-managed income. SLWS was launched on Dec 19, 2024 and is issued by Wisdom.
